{{CargoRelic
|name=Jetpack
|class_id=21374
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This is a portable flying device, usually powered by a small turbojet engine or rocket engine, allowing a single operator to perform short-distance flight missions through a propulsion device. The design of the jetpack also includes a stability control system to ensure the safety and ease of operation during flight.
|fame=47
|art=34
|fth=48
|civ=40
|tech=74
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
